name: RPlog_Art_of_Darkness
title: Art of Darkness
summary: In the art gallery of the Xi Charrian city of Xi Xin on Charros IV, the Presav Crestian receives the Falleen crime lord and former Moff Nasiri for a discreet meeting, the relaxed venue chosen to suit their tastes. Nasiri arrives with a nervous hooded companion, the woman Ystile, and after pleasantries over a tray of fine off-world drinks, the conversation turns to a shared concern: the Twi'lek Dark Sider Skawn Kairn and the broader threat posed by a man named Rhys, who disrupts the balance of things. Crestian admits Kairn was a black mark on their earlier efforts, once based on The Wheel before slipping away, and Nasiri confirms the name lines up with a security missive his lingering Moff status still brings him. The two trade information and veiled motives amid the gallery's art, Nasiri keeping his reasons for hunting Rhys a mystery that Crestian is content to allow. The meeting closes with Crestian extending the Xi Char and the Union's welcome to their guests.
